name: Freshwater lake sediment microcosm (Lianhuachi Lake, Beijing) spiked with 13C-bicarbonate + 15N-nitrate (PMC11344931)
description: Freshwater lake sediment microcosm (Lianhuachi Lake, Beijing) spiked with 13C-bicarbonate + 15N-nitrate — medium reported in PMC11344931 (complex/undefined base — extracts not BiGG-mappable).

provenance.citation: Medium composition from PMC11344931 (see GrowthDB record).
provenance.notes: Complex medium: chemically-defined portion mapped to BiGG; biological extracts listed in `unmapped`. Added via GrowthDB curation.

unmapped.name: lake sediment (~17 mL) + lake water (~8 mL) per subsample; sediment pH 7.1, salinity 0.52 ppt
